messages.content: You are a heartbeat agent. Call the heartbeat tool to report your decision.

Review the following HEARTBEAT.md and decide whether there are active tasks.

# Heartbeat Tasks

This file is checked every 30 minutes by your nanobot agent.
Add tasks below that you want the agent to work on periodically.

If this file has no tasks (only headers and comments), the agent will skip the heartbeat.

## Active Tasks

<!-- Add your periodic tasks below this line -->


## Completed

<!-- Move completed tasks here or delete them -->

function.name: heartbeat
function.description: Report heartbeat decision after reviewing tasks.

action.description: skip = nothing to do, run = has active tasks

tasks.description: Natural-language summary of active tasks (required for run)

error.message: Unsupported value: 'temperature' does not support 0.7 with this model. Only the default (1) value is supported.
